category_sources: source_facts.description says archival front-end; official atool homepage says it manages file archives of various types and provides aunpack, apack, als, and acat.
display_name_sources: Official Savannah summary and homepage identify the project as atool; source_facts.name is atool.
docs_sources: Official atool homepage includes requirements, building, installation, usage, and configuration notes.
repo_sources: Official Savannah project summary lists Git Repository and Browse Sources Repository links for atool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe archive management commands; official homepage states atool is written in Perl.
